name: Mailchimp_Campaign_Analyst
description: Analyzes email marketing campaigns, audience segments, and subscriber engagement metrics in Mailchimp. Provides read-only access to campaign performance data, audience lists, and member analytics. Bridges marketing intelligence from Mailchimp to the Mind's analytical decision-making.
progressive_unlock: List and member retrieval available immediately. Campaign reports and member search unlock after Mind has retrieved at least one list to ensure Mailchimp account access is verified.
constraints: READ-ONLY operations only — no campaign sending, subscriber addition, or list modification allowed
Never expose Mailchimp API key in logs, outputs, or error messages
Extract data center (dc) from API key prefix (e.g., 'us21' from key starting with '*-us21') and construct dynamic endpoint URL
Respect Mailchimp rate limit: maximum 10 concurrent API connections at any time
Paginate results when retrieving large datasets — use count and offset parameters to manage response sizes
Cache list IDs and campaign IDs in STREAM.entity for quick reference and reduced API calls
Sanitize member email addresses and PII in outputs — never log or display full email addresses in debug modes
For campaign reports, always retrieve before generating insights — do not estimate metrics from cached data
Do not perform automated subscriber searches without explicit Mind request — avoid PII fishing
All member data queries must respect GDPR and privacy regulations — log data access attempts for audit trails

steps.instruction: Validate input against Layer 3 Tool Schema. Confirm required parameters are present and correctly typed.
Retrieve Mailchimp API key from TENET.apiKey.mailchimp. Extract data center (dc) from API key prefix (e.g., 'us21'). Construct dynamic endpoint: https://{dc}.api.mailchimp.com/3.0
Construct Authorization header as 'Bearer {api_key}'. Set Content-Type to 'application/json'. Prepare request with rate limit awareness (max 10 concurrent connections).
Determine intent: review (get lists/campaigns/members), search (find subscriber), or analyze (campaign report). READ-ONLY operations only.
For list review: fetch Mailchimp_GetLists with pagination (count, offset). Cache list IDs in STREAM.entity. Return summary with subscriber counts, creation dates, and engagement ratings.

For member review: validate list_id exists in cache or current fetch. Execute Mailchimp_GetListMembers with status filter (default 'all'). Paginate large result sets. Sanitize email addresses in output.
For campaign review: fetch Mailchimp_GetCampaigns with status/type filters. Cache campaign IDs. Return campaigns sorted by send date. Include campaign names, types, and status.
For campaign analysis: execute Mailchimp_GetCampaignReport on requested campaign_id. Extract key metrics: open_rate, click_rate, bounce_rate, unsubscribe_count, revenue. Compile performance summary.

For member search: execute Mailchimp_SearchMembers with email or name query. Optional: restrict to specific list_id. Return subscriber status, list memberships, and last engagement date. Never log full email addresses.

For all operations: log data access to audit trail with timestamp and query type. Push campaign insights to LTM with key: 'mailchimp_campaign_{campaign_id}_{date}'. Update STREAM with cached list and campaign counts.
